title: Podolepis jaceoides
taxonomy: Podolepis jaceoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to eastern Australia. The plant is classified in the genus Podolepis. Within the family Asteraceae, it belongs to the subfamily Asteroideae. Its classification is further specified to the tribe Gnaphalieae.
